objectives.text: 掌握 when 和 while 的区别
掌握时间状语从句的时态

blocks.content: when 和 while 都可以引导时间状语从句，但用法不同：

rows: When I got home, my mom was cooking.
While I was reading, the phone rang.
When the bell rang, we were having class.
While she was sleeping, he was watching TV.

blocks.content: 时间状语从句和条件状语从句一样，遵循**主将从现**规则：

blocks.title: 规则
blocks.content: 当主句用一般将来时，时间状语从句用一般现在时代替将来时。when/while/before/after/as soon as 引导的从句都遵循此规则。

rows: I will call you when I arrive.
I will call you when I will arrive.
She will wait while I eat lunch.
She will wait while I will eat lunch.
Wash your hands before you eat.
I will call you after I finish work.
I will wait until you come back.
I will tell him as soon as he arrives.

blocks.title: until 的否定
blocks.content: not...until 表示「直到...才」：I didn't go to bed until midnight.（我直到午夜才睡觉）。

examples.title: 例1：when 和 while 的选择

problem.content: ___ I was walking in the park, I saw a beautiful bird.

solution.content: walking 是延续性动作，while 强调「在...期间」，用 while 引导延续性动作的从句更恰当。答案选 B。

examples.title: 例2：主将从现在时间从句中的应用

problem.content: I will tell him the news when he ___ back.

solution.content: 主句 will tell 是将来时，when 引导的时间从句用一般现在时 comes，遵循主将从现原则。答案选 B。

children.text: when + 短动作或延续动作
while + 延续动作（强调持续）
主将从现：主句将来，从句现在
